name: all seven cloud and governance namespaces now carry enforced detector rules
command: n=0; for ns in aws azure gcp hashicorp linux-foundation security-governance us-government; do grep -qE '^- id: g-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/$ns/$ns-iac-enforcement.yaml" && n=$((n+1)); done; [ "$n" -eq 7 ] && echo seven-namespaces-enforced 1>&2
